description_long: This object is a flat-panel LG computer monitor with a widescreen display, featuring a thin black bezel that frames the screen. The front view shows a vibrant display with a Windows operating system interface, and the LG logo is centered on the lower bezel. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand with a wide, flat base for stability. The rear panel is plain black with a subtle LG logo embossed in the center, and no visible ports or buttons. The monitor's profile is extremely slim, emphasizing its modern, minimalist design, and the materials appear to be primarily matte plastic with a glass or acrylic screen surface.
description: A slim, widescreen LG computer monitor with a thin black bezel, flat base stand, and a vibrant display. The design is modern and minimalist, with subtle branding and no visible ports or buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the widescreen display, thin bezel, LG logo on the lower bezel, and the monitor's flat base stand.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the monitor's ultra-slim thickness and the depth of the rectangular pedestal stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black panel with an embossed LG logo and the central support column of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the slimness and the structure of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, with sharp corners and a uniform width around the display. It has a smooth, non-reflective finish and no decorative elements except for the LG logo at the bottom center.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular pedestal type with a wide, solid base and a vertical support column, all in matte black plastic with a simple, geometric design and no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single power button is implied at the bottom center of the bezel, directly below the LG logo, with no other buttons visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The LG logo is present at the center of the bottom bezel on the front and embossed in the center of the rear panel, both in a subtle, monochrome style.
